name: Kunming Yunnei Power Co.,Ltd.
summary: Kunming Yunnei Power Co.,Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells diesel, nature gas, and duel fuel engines in China. The company offers nanometer ceramic thermal insulation films for automobiles and buildings; float glass products; and deep processing products, as well as various oils, such as heavy duty gear and diesel engine oil, and antifreezing solutions. It also provides remanufactured engines, generator sets, casting parts, and agricultural machineries, including rotary and hay loaders; and frame and compartment assemblies for mini, light, and medium-sized trucks. In addition, the company offers buses with gas and hybrid fuel power. Its diesel engines have applications in forklift trucks, harvesters, loaders, tractors, generator sets, stationary power equipment, etc. The company exports its products to Europe, South America, Africa, and Southeast Asia. Kunming Yunnei Power Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Kunming, China.
